---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for the DecentralChain protobuf schemas
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Abstract

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe the problem clearly.

## Motivation and Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What use cases does it enable? How does it benefit the DecentralChain ecosystem?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired behavior in detail. Include API examples, proto schema snippets, or code samples if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered alternative approaches? If so, describe them and explain why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Backwards Compatibility

Could this change affect existing consumers of the proto schemas? If so, how would migration work?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request here.
